title: Associate Data Scientist
description: National competency certification under Indonesia's SKKNI standard, covering 9 competency units across the data science lifecycle - from data labeling and collection to validation, feature construction, and model evaluation.

title: TensorFlow: Data and Deployment
description: Four-course specialization on deploying TensorFlow models to browsers with TensorFlow.js, mobile and embedded devices, building data pipelines with TFDS, and advanced serving with TensorFlow Serving, Hub, and TensorBoard.

title: DeepLearning.AI TensorFlow Developer
description: Four-course professional program covering neural networks, CNNs for computer vision, NLP, and time series forecasting with TensorFlow - preparation for the Google TensorFlow Developer Certificate exam.

title: Machine Learning Specialization
description: Three-course foundational specialization covering supervised learning (regression, neural networks, decision trees), unsupervised learning (clustering, recommender systems), and best practices for building ML systems, taught by Andrew Ng.

title: SQL Server for Intermediate
description: Intermediate-level coursework covering complex queries, security management, indexing and query optimization, views, SQL extensions and stored procedures, backup and recovery, data transfer, and automating system administration tasks.
